ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the issue was reported */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., NEW, IN PROGRESS, RESOLVED) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution notes or comments on the issue */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the issue for easy search and categorization */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the team member assigned to the issue */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the issue */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who resolved the issue */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was resolved */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Expected date by which the issue should be resolved */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the issue belongs */,
  "component" TEXT /* Component or module of the software where the issue is found */,
  "reproducibility" TEXT /* How consistently the issue can be reproduced (e.g., Always, Sometimes, Never) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Impact of the issue (e.g., Critical, High, Medium, Low) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software where the issue was found */,
  "linked_issues" TEXT /* IDs of other issues that are related to this issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., status, priority, resolution) */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the change log entry */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the change */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* URLs or paths to any attached files */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_changes_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, project manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ACTIVE, COMPLETED, DELAYED) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* URLs or paths to any attached files */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)
